creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG

New Revision: 305391
URL: http://svn.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/305391

Log:
  - Update to 3.5
  - Cosmetics on pkg-descr (remove tab in front of WWW, etc.)
  
  PR:		ports/172208
  Submitted by:	"Simon Olofsson" <simon@olofsson.de> (maintainer)

  head/www/xpi-vimperator/Makefile
  head/www/xpi-vimperator/distinfo
  head/www/xpi-vimperator/pkg-descr
  head/www/xpi-vimperator/pkg-plist

Modified: head/www/xpi-vimperator/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/www/xpi-vimperator/Makefile	Sat Oct  6 17:42:14 2012	(r305390)
+++ head/www/xpi-vimperator/Makefile	Sat Oct  6 17:45:13 2012	(r305391)
@@ -6,7 +6,7 @@
 #
 
 PORTNAME=	vimperator
-PORTVERSION=	3.4
+PORTVERSION=	3.5
 DISTVERSIONSUFFIX=	-fx
 CATEGORIES=	www
 

Modified: head/www/xpi-vimperator/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- head/www/xpi-vimperator/distinfo	Sat Oct  6 17:42:14 2012	(r305390)
+++ head/www/xpi-vimperator/distinfo	Sat Oct  6 17:45:13 2012	(r305391)
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
-SHA256 (xpi/vimperator-3.4-fx.xpi) = 61c7e1f0d69d9a18cffaf33a2309b6dec4401cc4a09a53142e5903dc2bc745ca
-SIZE (xpi/vimperator-3.4-fx.xpi) = 621510
+SHA256 (xpi/vimperator-3.5-fx.xpi) = 16f623ceb71e8a490ead83501e42d55a079568a24ddff00e5c90abef698317f6
+SIZE (xpi/vimperator-3.5-fx.xpi) = 583838

Modified: head/www/xpi-vimperator/pkg-descr
==============================================================================
--- head/www/xpi-vimperator/pkg-descr	Sat Oct  6 17:42:14 2012	(r305390)
+++ head/www/xpi-vimperator/pkg-descr	Sat Oct  6 17:45:13 2012	(r305391)
@@ -1,6 +1,5 @@
 Vimperator is a free browser add-on for Firefox, which makes it look and behave
-like the Vim text editor. It has similar key bindings, and you could call it
-a modal webbrowser, as key bindings differ according to which mode you are in.
+like the Vim text editor. It has similar key bindings, and you could call it a
+modal webbrowser, as key bindings differ according to which mode you are in.
 
-Author:	Martin Stubenschrott <stubenschrott@gmx.net>
-WWW:	http://vimperator.org/vimperator
+WWW: http://vimperator.org/vimperator
